summary: Reconciliation proposal authored covering 6 sections (membership tiers, 7 core modules, roadmap phases, Connect-to-Earn, 6 Roots status, QOT bridge). Three-way drift surfaced. sync_runtime_to_public.yml extended (HD-03 fix from Cursor audit §8.9). 3 DOT deliverables shipped. NTS approval gate per R-AUTH-01.

4 enumerated tiers in catalog: Explorer/Seeker/Builder/Sovereign (not the legacy 6-tier project knowledge)

Dispatch listed 12 action types; reality is 14 (corrected in proposal §4)
Dispatch hinted membership 'tier-flexible'; reality is 4 enumerated tiers (corrected in proposal §1)
QOT bridge between UZG+ and AIER Code is NOT visible at any inspected source surface — requires separate audit
aier-verify self-verify (Phase I) likely FAIL — same pattern as prior 2 tasks, catches honest PENDING/PARTIAL fields, NOT fake-greened per dispatch §7 #1

After approval: dispatch LANE01-CANON-V2-EDIT-AND-LOCK-V1 to apply edits to canon docs in C:/workspace/UZGPLUS/. In parallel: dispatch LANE01-QOT-BRIDGE-LOCATE-AND-AUDIT-V1 to resolve §6 architectural unknown. Deferred: LANE01-CANON-V2-TOKENOMICS-RECONCILIATION-V1 for C001-C005 conflicts.

post_merge_critical_incident.summary: Cursor's audit log line 19 contains a leaked classic GitHub PAT (ghp_R...). Discovered when sync_runtime_to_public push protection blocked propagation to Live mirror. Token is in Uniton_Shared main commit history (PR #14 commit 7a9fd75).
post_merge_critical_incident.clac1_response: Updated sync workflow to exclude *_audit.log from public mirror; documented in report §17, snapshot post_merge_incident.
